dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Macro agent (highest individual confidence at 0.68) sees falling VIX + overnight gap-up as classic capitulation-reversal setup, while level_thesis abstains as price at pivot is tactically neutral pending a 674.81 level test — neither dissenter is low-conviction.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The bearish consensus assumes CLEAN_BEAR ribbon dominates overnight gap-up and falling VIX, but the ribbon spread of 106c (unusually wide — strong bears show <50c) already signals low bear conviction; both bearish agents' individual confidences (0.45–0.58) are lower than the dissenting macro agent (0.68).
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY holds 674.81 Active support on any pullback in the first 60 minutes without a volume flush — gap does not fill, price stabilizes above the battle level, validating the falling-VIX + gap-up bullish macro thesis and invalidating the CLEAN_BEAR continuation read.

primary.condition: if SPY sells off from open and breaks 674.81 on volume ≥1.5× 20-bar average

secondary.condition: if overnight gap-up momentum holds above pivot (678.12) and 679.0 Reference clears with a 5-min close

invalidation.condition: SPY holds 674.81 on any pullback in the first 60 minutes without a volume flush — gap does not fill, price stabilizes above battle level
invalidation.effect: Bearish consensus structurally invalidated; falling VIX + gap-up risk-on macro thesis takes control targeting 683.33 Active resistance; no bearish entry on ribbon alone is justified.

swarm_predictions.claim: 674.81 Active 2★ support is tested within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET), as price is only $3.31 below the open (678.12) and the CLEAN_BEAR ribbon + prior-session low make a gap-fill attempt the most natural early move.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 674.81 by 10:30 ET, instead extending immediately above 679.0 Reference resistance on gap-up follow-through.

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 25.50 for the entire RTH session — the −1.04% falling trajectory from premarket continues and the overnight gap-up's risk-on signal is not reversed by a volatility spike.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX rises above 25.50 at any point during RTH, reversing the capitulation narrative and confirming the overnight gap as a bear trap.

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (fast 677.80 < pivot 678.12 < slow 678.86, spread 106c) does not flip to bullish stack configuration (fast > pivot > slow, spread ≥30c) before 13:00 ET — bear structure remains the dominant daily frame even if price rallies.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon fully flips bullish (fast > pivot > slow, spread ≥30c) before 12:00 ET noon.

synthesis_narrative: Today's core tension: a CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (106c spread, established downtrend) is being directly challenged by a $0.99 overnight gap-up into falling VIX (24.65, −1.04%) — the exact combination that historically precedes reversals, not continuations. The narrow bearish vote majority (technical + internals, combined weight 0.45) is outgunned in individual conviction by the dissenting macro agent (0.68) and abstaining level_thesis (0.52); the validator explicitly rates the consensus 'weak,' noting the wide ribbon spread signals a low-conviction bear. The single most important thing to watch at open is whether price reaches and holds 674.81 Active support — a volume flush through that level activates the CLEAN_BEAR continuation toward 662.42 Carry, while any hold hands the session to the falling-VIX bull thesis targeting 683.33.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (106c spread) is the dominant structure but moderate confidence only — overnight gap-up at pivot and mixed last-3-bar structure (red→doji→green) create conflicting signals.

macro.one_line: VIX HIGH but falling (−1.04%, 24.65) + zero event risk + overnight gap-up = classic capitulation setup favoring call buyers despite bearish ribbon context.

level_thesis.one_line: Price locked at pivot (678.12) in tactically neutral zone — real decision is at 674.81 Active support below or 683.33 Active resistance above; abstaining until a directional test fires.

internals.one_line: XLF −0.54% + XLE −0.82% signal incomplete risk-off rotation — financials and energy weak but XLK flat; sector basis is modest bearish, not broad-based SPY selloff.

validator.top_invalidation: Wide ribbon spread (106c vs <50c for strong bears) + macro's falling-VIX thesis carrying higher confidence (0.68) than either bearish agent — bear case is fragile and vulnerable to overnight gap-up follow-through if 674.81 holds.
